title: B2B Lead Intelligence Input
description: Describe your Ideal Customer Profile (ICP) and the sources to scan; the actor finds matching companies, enriches them with contacts / tech stack / decision-makers / intent signals, and ranks by fit. Direct URLs are also accepted as a fallback.

mode.title: Run Mode
mode.description: How much work to do per lead. 'feed' = fast trigger feed: source the leads, attach signals + ICP relevance, no per-site crawl. 5x cheaper, ~30s for 20 leads, thinner data. 'enriched' = full crawl: contacts, tech stack, decision-makers, intent signals — everything.
mode.sectionDescription: Pick fast trigger-feed for high-volume sourcing, or deep enrichment for sales-ready records.

idealCustomerProfile.title: Ideal Customer Profile (ICP)
idealCustomerProfile.description: Describe your target customer. Drives both sourcing relevance (which discovered companies surface to the top) and the per-lead 0-100 fit score with reasons / disqualifiers. Leave empty only if you are running URL-only enrichment without scoring.
idealCustomerProfile.sectionDescription: The ICP is the spine of this actor — it shapes which leads get sourced, how they're scored, and what the outreach hooks emphasise.

sourcing.title: Lead Sourcing
sourcing.description: Pick the public sources to scan. The actor discovers companies matching your ICP, dedupes across sources, ranks by relevance (signal-type weighting + multi-source overlap + ICP keyword/industry hits), then enriches the top N in the same run.
sourcing.sectionDescription: Login-free, challenge-compliant sources: Y Combinator directory, HN 'Who is hiring' threads, TechCrunch funding/launch articles, PRNewswire press releases, Crunchbase News. No LinkedIn / Apollo / Google scraping.

urls.title: Direct Company URLs (optional)
urls.description: Skip the sourcing block and feed URLs directly when you already have a target list (e.g. existing CRM accounts you want enriched + scored). Combinable with sourcing — both sets get enriched in the same run.
urls.sectionCaption: 3. Or Enrich a Specific URL List (optional)
urls.sectionDescription: Most users should use the Sourcing block above. Use this when you already have a target list to enrich + score.

extractKeyPeople.title: Extract Decision Makers
extractKeyPeople.description: Crawl team / leadership / about pages and extract decision-makers (name, title, role category, LinkedIn URL). Categories: founder, executive, sales, marketing, tech, product, finance, people.
extractKeyPeople.sectionDescription: Sales-focused features: who to contact, why now, and is this lead worth pursuing.

detectIntentSignals.title: Detect Buying-Intent Signals
detectIntentSignals.description: Surface trigger events worth reaching out about: recent funding mentions, hiring surges (open roles by department), leadership changes, product launches, and recent press headlines.

generateOutreachHooks.title: Generate Outreach Hooks (LLM)
generateOutreachHooks.description: Use Apify's built-in LLM (OpenRouter proxy) to generate 2-3 ready-to-send personalisation hooks per lead, grounded in the extracted signals. Adds an LLM cost (billed as Apify platform usage). Off by default.

extractEmails.title: Extract Emails
extractEmails.description: Find and extract business email addresses (info@, sales@, contact@, etc.). Filters out generic emails like noreply@.
extractEmails.sectionDescription: Always-on extraction layer applied to every lead — sourced or directly-input.

extractPhones.title: Extract Phone Numbers
extractPhones.description: Find and extract phone numbers in various formats (US, international, formatted).

detectTechStack.title: Detect Tech Stack
detectTechStack.description: Identify 50+ technologies including CMS (WordPress, Shopify), analytics (GA, Mixpanel), chat widgets (Intercom, Drift), payment (Stripe), and frameworks (React, Vue).

includeSocialProfiles.title: Include Social Profiles
includeSocialProfiles.description: Extract links to social media profiles: LinkedIn, Twitter/X, Facebook, YouTube, GitHub, Instagram, Crunchbase.

detectBusinessSignals.title: Detect Business Signals
detectBusinessSignals.description: Identify business signals: careers page (hiring), pricing page, blog activity, customer logos, and estimate company size (1-10, 11-50, 51-200, 200+).

maxPagesPerDomain.title: Max Pages Per Domain
maxPagesPerDomain.description: Maximum pages to crawl per company. More pages = better decision-maker and intent-signal coverage but longer runtime and higher cost. Recommended: 10 for basic enrichment, 20+ for full BD analysis.
maxPagesPerDomain.sectionDescription: Tune crawl depth and proxy behaviour.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Use Apify Proxy to avoid being blocked by websites. Highly recommended for large-scale enrichment or sites with bot protection.
